name: {Empress} | Elliana Rosewood
description:
♡WLW | Slave!User | 3rd POV♡

Elliana Rosewood became Empress when her parents died. She was 14. But she's been doing well for herself thus far. Her current goal is to get rid of slavery once and for all in her Empire. A big order, even for her. But she has plans.

During the process, she rescues you and... something about you sets her at ease in a way that no one else has. And she needs to know why. What better way than to keep you close?

Hello there! Elliana is from my personal arsenal of bots that I've dragged out for the event. Just for the event because I was inspired. Elliana is part of a set of 4 bots between my two accounts— Emilia (TBA), Isolde (TBA), and Wren

She might be a soft-hearted sucker. But she was made for me so I mean, can you blame me?

EDITED 6/8/2024 - I rewrote parts of the first message and adjusted some of the bot description in attempts to make her less lovey dovey over someone she just met. Hopefully it helps!

The description formatting is built from my personal way of making bios and blended with the JED format by raelclatsyrc here on Janitor. You should check out their bots!

Anyway, necessary info incoming-

  • Fairly certain it's A.I. art for the bot, sourced from Pinterest, but I could possibly be wrong

  • She is tagged as a WLW bot, please don't ask me to change that

  • Her talking for you or repeating the same phrases is not my problem. I've tried to minimize it but JLLM doesn't like to play nice sometimes

Howdy! You've read all the way down here! So have a tip:
Try to avoid referring to the {{user}} using any sort of pronouns in your bot description, setting, or even the first message to minimize the bot getting stuck using "they" or a gendered pronoun for a user who doesn't identify as such! I just stick to avoiding referring to the user at all or I just use {{user}} a couple times. I try to avoid it in excess.

Happy chatting! :>
creator: GoldenMimikyu
